steps.title: Find the stated contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts Indigenous-led cultural centers with non-Indigenous museums. The Pueblo of Pojoaque and Tohono O'odham centers use traditional knowledge and serve tribal citizens, while non-Indigenous museums tend to anticipate mainly non-Indigenous audiences.

steps.title: Reject details not stated
steps.content: A and B describe exhibit size and museum size, neither of which is mentioned. D describes tribal history and culture, but the question asks how non-Indigenous museums differ. The stated difference is audience. The answer is C.
